overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through the abandoned Pacifica amusement park district. The scene features decaying roller coasters, Ferris wheels, overgrown lots with makeshift stilt shacks, and dilapidated market stalls under harsh midday desert sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a covered concrete pathway beneath an overpass, passing stairs and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: white concrete barrier running along the right side of the walkway
red metal roller coaster tracks towering in the distance against the blue sky
wide concrete staircase leading up to the overpass structure
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
blue plastic bins and garbage bags piled against the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered concrete walkway beneath a massive overpass structure. The player moves forward past a staircase on the right, with graffiti-covered walls and scattered trash containers lining the path. In the distance, the red tracks of an abandoned roller coaster are visible against the bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned overgrown lot with wooden stilt shacks

events.description: exits covered concrete walkway into open dirt area with abandoned structures

agents.ego_description: turning left into an open abandoned area, walking past derelict wooden shacks on stilts

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden house raised on concrete stilts with rusted metal siding
overgrown lot with yellow-brown dry grass and weeds
unpaved dusty earth path cutting through the abandoned lot

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered walkway into a wide-open abandoned lot. The ground transitions to dry dirt and yellow grass. Dilapidated wooden shacks on stilts dominate the center view, while the roller coaster structure grows larger on the left. The environment is exposed to bright sunlight with no overhead cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned amusement park grounds approaching roller coaster

agents.ego_description: walking through dry brush toward the amusement park rides, with the Ferris wheel and roller coaster tracks becoming prominent

entered.detail: tall white and red Ferris wheel standing beside the roller coaster
red steel roller coaster tracks with support beams curving through the sky
scrubby desert vegetation and tumbleweeds in the foreground
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Moving through dry desert vegetation, the player approaches the abandoned amusement park rides. The Ferris wheel and red roller coaster tracks dominate the skyline ahead, while the futuristic city skyline appears in the far distance to the right. The ground remains unpaved dirt with scattered dry bushes.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with abandoned market stalls and palm trees

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt to paved concrete tiles

agents.ego_description: walking along a paved plaza lined with palm trees, approaching abandoned market stalls and neon signs

entered.detail: wide open concrete paved area with geometric tile patterns
abandoned food carts and market canopies with colorful awnings
illuminated signage including an 'OPEN' sign and 'WORKS' neon
large brutalist concrete structure with parking garage levels
green painted metal railings and crowd control barriers

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a paved concrete plaza as the player moves deeper into the abandoned commercial area. Palm trees line the walkway, and abandoned market stalls with faded colorful awnings appear ahead. A massive concrete building rises on the right with neon signs, while metal barriers guide the path forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor seating area of abandoned food vendors

events.description: slows slightly while passing seated individual at outdoor table

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor seating with red plastic chairs, observing a lone seated figure at a table

notable_agents.action: sitting alone at a metal table with a drink, wearing casual gray jacket and purple pants

entered.detail: stacked and arranged red plastic outdoor chairs around metal tables
square metal outdoor dining tables with items on surface
colorful vertical banner with 'SALES' text and product advertisements
abandoned food service cart with umbrella and cooking equipment

segments.scene_description: The final segment features an outdoor seating area with scattered red plastic chairs and metal tables. A lone NPC sits at a table on the right, drinking. The player walks past advertising banners and abandoned food carts, approaching the central amusement park structures with metal barriers lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a shadowed urban underpass into the bright, decaying expanse of an abandoned amusement park district. It begins on a covered concrete walkway lined with graffiti and trash, moving past a staircase toward the distant red tracks of a roller coaster. As the camera emerges from the cover, the environment opens into a wide, sun-drenched lot of dry dirt and yellow grass dominated by dilapidated wooden shacks on stilts. The scene then shifts through desert vegetation toward the towering Ferris wheel and roller coaster, with the futuristic city skyline appearing in the far distance before the terrain transitions back to a paved concrete plaza. Finally, the path leads past palm trees and faded market stalls into an outdoor seating area with scattered red chairs and a lone NPC, moving toward the central park structures behind metal barriers.
